import type { SVGProps } from "react";

const Angular = (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) => (
  <svg {...props} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 242 256">
    <g clipPath="url(#a)">
      <mask
        id="b"
        width="242"
        height="256"
        x="0"
        y="0"
        maskUnits="userSpaceOnUse"
        style={{ maskType: "luminance" }}
      >
        <path fill="#fff" d="M0 0h242v256H0V0Z" />
      </mask>
      <g mask="url(#b)">
        <path
          fill="url(#c)"
          d="m241 43-9 136L149 0l92 43Zm-58 176-62 36-63-36 12-31h101l12 31ZM121 68l32 80H88l33-80ZM9 179 0 43 92 0 9 179Z"
        />
        <path
          fill="url(#d)"
          d="m241 43-9 136L149 0l92 43Zm-58 176-62 36-63-36 12-31h101l12 31ZM121 68l32 80H88l33-80ZM9 179 0 43 92 0 9 179Z"
        />
      </g>
    </g>
    <defs>
      <linearGradient
        id="c"
        x1="53.2"
        x2="245"
        y1="231.9"
        y2="140.7"
        gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"
      >
        <stop stop-color="#E40035" />
        <stop offset=".2" stop-color="#F60A48" />
        <stop offset=".4" stop-color="#F20755" />
        <stop offset=".5" stop-color="#DC087D" />
        <stop offset=".7" stop-color="#9717E7" />
        <stop offset="1" stop-color="#6C00F5" />
      </linearGradient>
      <linearGradient
        id="d"
        x1="44.5"
        x2="170"
        y1="30.7"
        y2="174"
        gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse"
      >
        <stop stop-color="#FF31D9" />
        <stop offset="1" stop-color="#FF5BE1" stop-opacity="0" />
      </linearGradient>
      <clipPath id="a">
        <path fill="#fff" d="M0 0h242v256H0z" />
      </clipPath>
    </defs>
  </svg>
);

export { Angular };
